sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96996" key="stomaxikeu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στομᾰχ-ῐκεύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n96996.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be disordered in the stomach</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
